entities.name: LIBERIA
entities.description: A country in West Africa characterized by high levels of gender-related health inequalities.

entities.name: GENDER HEALTH INEQUALITIES
entities.description: Disparities in health status and outcomes between genders.

entities.name: SELF-ASSESSED HEALTH STATUS
entities.description: A dichotomised variable measuring good versus poor health as perceived by the individual.

entities.name: LIBERIAN HOUSEHOLD INCOME EXPENDITURE SURVEY 2014
entities.description: The data source used to collect household information in Liberia in 2014.

entities.name: TWO STAGE SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling methodology used to select 4,104 households for the survey.

entities.name: OAXACA–BLINDER DECOMPOSITION
entities.description: A statistical method for non-linear models used to assess the magnitude and contributions of factors to inequality.

entities.name: ENDOWMENTS
entities.description: Factors that explain a significant portion of gender inequalities in health status.

entities.name: ACCESS TO INFORMATION
entities.description: Availability of electronic and print media to reduce gender health gaps.

entities.name: WEALTH
entities.description: Economic resources that contribute to health inequality and can be improved through specific sectors.

entities.name: MOSQUITO NETS
entities.description: Preventive tools whose utilization can reduce gender health gaps.

entities.name: RURAL AREAS
entities.description: Geographic regions where gender health disparities are more pronounced.

entities.name: EDUCATION
entities.description: A key sector for gender-responsive interventions to improve wealth.

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: A key sector for gender-responsive interventions to improve wealth.

entities.name: SOCIAL PROTECTION
entities.description: A key sector for gender-responsive interventions to improve wealth.

entities.name: HOUSING
entities.description: A key sector for gender-responsive interventions to improve wealth.

entities.name: HEALTH SERVICES
entities.description: Provision of quality care and preventive services to reduce disease burden.

entities.name: PREVENTIVE CARE
entities.description: A component of improved health services aimed at reducing disease burden.
